calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Mercy Housing California represented by agent Jason Cardona.
Ted Janowsky, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant: David A. Irving.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.

The Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshari, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in Dept. 304-B.

The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for settlement and entry of Judgment", which was /// NOT filed.

Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.

This case did NOT settle, TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
